package rulefixtures

// #include <stdlib.h>
import (
	"C"
)

// scenario for cgo_string_lifetime: `C.CString(goString)` without a corresponding `C.free` in the same function, or deferred `C.free`
// fixture polarity: positive; family: security; severity: warning.
func scenario698Positive(value string) *C.char {
	ptr := C.CString(value)
	return ptr
}
